header.title: Bridging the Gap Between Youth Leadership and Global Governance.
header.description: The Centre for Strategic Youth and Global Affairs (CSYGA) is an international think tank and leadership incubator dedicated to empowering the next generation of diplomatic leaders.

visionFocus.title: Vision Focus
visionFocus.heading: How We Build Future Diplomats
visionFocus.description: Three strategic tracks that shape every CSYGA program.

items.title: Strategic Research
items.description: Producing practical policy insight on diplomacy, governance, and regional stability.

items.title: Diplomatic Training
items.description: Training young professionals in negotiation, mediation, and institutional communication.

items.title: Youth Leadership
items.description: Mentoring youth to lead simulations, policy forums, and cross-border initiatives.

mission.title: The Mission
mission.p1: To provide young leaders with the strategic tools, diplomatic training, and institutional access required to navigate and influence the complexities of modern global affairs.
mission.p2: Through innovative programs and strategic partnerships, we create platforms for meaningful youth participation in diplomatic processes, policy development, and cross-cultural dialogue.

vision.title: The Vision
vision.p1: To build a sustainable global ecosystem where youth-driven diplomacy, ethical technology, and humanitarian action create a more secure and inclusive world.
vision.p2: Our long-term direction is to build a connected generation of youth diplomats who can engage institutions with competence, ethics, and strategic clarity.

corePillars.title: Core Pillars
corePillars.heading: Our Operating Framework
corePillars.description: The key pillars that guide our programs, partnerships, and policy engagement.

items.title: Youth-Driven Diplomacy
items.description: Creating high-level platforms for young professionals to engage directly with state actors and international organizations.

items.title: Ethical Technology
items.description: Promoting the responsible use of digital tools and AI in peacebuilding and public discourse.

items.title: Humanitarian Action
items.description: Strengthening the role of youth in crisis response, advocacy, and international cooperation.

items.title: Leadership Development
items.description: Equipping future policymakers with technical skills in negotiation, policy analysis, and strategic communication.

whyCsyga.title: Authority
whyCsyga.heading: Why CSYGA?
whyCsyga.description: What gives our platform institutional credibility and long-term value.

items.title: Proven Track Record
items.description: Our initiatives have engaged hundreds of participants from over 50 countries, creating a truly global network of emerging leaders.

items.title: Institutional Access
items.description: Based in the diplomatic hub of Istanbul, we facilitate direct engagement with consulates, municipal governments, and international NGOs.

items.title: Strategic Impact
items.description: We do not only host events; we produce policy recommendations and simulations that prepare youth for real-world diplomatic challenges.

globalFootprint.title: Our Global Footprint
globalFootprint.description: Key metrics from our journey so far

eventHighlights.title: Past Events
eventHighlights.heading: Impact From Previous Programs
eventHighlights.description: Every image and metric below comes from CSYGA programs and partner events.

items.title: New Diplomacy Conference 2025
items.description: Delegates explored conflict resolution, policy innovation, and state-youth dialogue.

items.title: Borders and Brinkmanship Forum
items.description: High-level discussions on regional security, defense economics, and diplomacy.

items.title: Youth & Civil Society Workshop
items.description: Hands-on practice in mediation, digital dialogue, and civic action planning.

leadership.title: Leadership & Governance
leadership.description: CSYGA is led by a board of experts in international relations, digital governance, and humanitarian diplomacy, supported by a global secretariat of passionate young professionals.

aboutPartners.title: Institutional Partners
aboutPartners.caption: Working in collaboration with leading governmental and non-governmental institutions to foster global youth empowerment.
